tasks.subject: Task 0: v2 마이그레이션 _legacy/ 이동 + 빈 v3 체인 준비
tasks.description:
**Goal:** v2 마이그레이션 7개를 `_legacy/migrations-v2/`로 이동하고 v3 빈 체인을 위한 `migrations/index.ts`를 재작성. `assertNoLegacyMigrations(db)` 가드 추가.

**Files:**
- Move: `src/main/database/migrations/001..007*.ts` → `_legacy/migrations-v2/`
- Rewrite: `src/main/database/migrations/index.ts`
- Create: `_legacy/migrations-v2/README.md`
- Modify: `src/main/database/migrator.ts`

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/main/database/__tests__/migrator.test.ts`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/main/database/migrations/index.ts","src/main/database/migrator.ts","_legacy/migrations-v2/README.md"],"verifyCommand":"npx vitest run src/main/database/__tests__/migrator.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["v2 7개 파일 _legacy 이동","index.ts empty migrations[]","assertNoLegacyMigrations throws on v2 row"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: v3 마이그레이션 001~004 (core/projects/channels/meetings)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** spec §5.2 001~004 DDL을 그대로 TS 마이그레이션 파일로 작성, 스키마 테스트로 CHECK/FK/UNIQUE/DM partial index 모두 검증.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/main/database/migrations/001-core.ts`, `002-projects.ts`, `003-channels.ts`, `004-meetings.ts`
- Modify: `src/main/database/migrations/index.ts`
- Create: `src/main/database/__tests__/schema-001-004.test.ts`

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/main/database/__tests__/schema-001-004.test.ts`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/main/database/migrations/001-core.ts","src/main/database/migrations/002-projects.ts","src/main/database/migrations/003-channels.ts","src/main/database/migrations/004-meetings.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npx vitest run src/main/database/__tests__/schema-001-004.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["spec §5.2 DDL 일치","FK/CHECK 위반 throw","DM partial unique 동작","meetings active unique"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: v3 마이그레이션 005~007 (messages+FTS/approval/queue)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** spec §5.2 005~007 — messages + FTS5 트리거 3종 + author conditional FK 트리거 + approval_items + queue_items. FTS 검색 + author 트리거 테스트.

**Files:**
- Create: `005-messages.ts`, `006-approval-inbox.ts`, `007-queue.ts`
- Modify: `migrations/index.ts`
- Create: `schema-005-007.test.ts`

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/main/database/__tests__/schema-005-007.test.ts`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/main/database/migrations/005-messages.ts","src/main/database/migrations/006-approval-inbox.ts","src/main/database/migrations/007-queue.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npx vitest run src/main/database/__tests__/schema-005-007.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["FTS bm25 rank 반환","author_kind=user+id!=user throw","approval status CHECK","queue order_index 중복 허용"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: v3 마이그레이션 008~011 (memory/audit/remote/notifications v2 이식)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** v2 memory·audit·remote DDL 이식 + notifications 신규. ON DELETE는 SET NULL 또는 없음 (감사 유실 방지). 재실행 idempotent 검증.

**Files:**
- Create: `008-memory.ts` (v2 004 이식), `009-audit.ts` (v2 001 audit_log 추출), `010-remote.ts` (v2 003 이식), `011-notifications.ts`
- Modify: `migrations/index.ts`
- Create: `schema-008-011.test.ts`

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/main/database/__tests__/`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/main/database/migrations/008-memory.ts","src/main/database/migrations/009-audit.ts","src/main/database/migrations/010-remote.ts","src/main/database/migrations/011-notifications.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npx vitest run src/main/database/__tests__/","acceptanceCriteria":["v2 DDL 원본 일치","audit ON DELETE SET NULL","재실행 no-op","notification_prefs CHECK"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Shared 도메인 타입 9개 파일
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `src/shared/` 아래 arena-root / project / channel / message / meeting / approval / queue / member-profile / notification 타입 정의. DB 컬럼과 camelCase 1:1 매핑.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/shared/{arena-root,project,channel,message,meeting,approval,queue,member-profile,notification}-types.ts`

**Verify:** `npx tsc --noEmit`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/shared/arena-root-types.ts","src/shared/project-types.ts","src/shared/channel-types.ts","src/shared/message-types.ts","src/shared/meeting-types.ts","src/shared/approval-types.ts","src/shared/queue-types.ts","src/shared/member-profile-types.ts","src/shared/notification-types.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npx tsc --noEmit","acceptanceCriteria":["DB 컬럼과 1:1 camelCase","discriminated union 적용","순환 import 없음"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: ArenaRootService + resolveProjectPaths (R1 이식)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** R1 `tools/cli-smoke` arena 유틸을 `src/main/arena/`로 이식, `connection.ts`를 ArenaRoot 기반 DB 경로로 변경, 앱 부팅 루프 초기화.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/main/arena/arena-root-service.ts`, `resolve-project-paths.ts` + tests
- Modify: `src/main/database/connection.ts`, `src/main/index.ts`

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/main/arena/__tests__/`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/main/arena/arena-root-service.ts","src/main/arena/resolve-project-paths.ts","src/main/database/connection.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npx vitest run src/main/arena/__tests__/","acceptanceCriteria":["6 하위 디렉토리 ensure","DB 경로가 <ArenaRoot>/db/arena.sqlite","resolveProjectPaths 3종 분기"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: PermissionService 재설계 (path-guard + realpath 재검증)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** R1 path-guard 로직을 Main PermissionService로 이식, CLI spawn 직전 `resolveForCli(projectId)`로 TOCTOU 재검증, allowedRoots = [consensusPath, activeProject cwdPath].

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/main/files/permission-service.ts`
- Create: `permission-service-v3.test.ts`

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/main/files/__tests__/permission-service-v3.test.ts`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/main/files/permission-service.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npx vitest run src/main/files/__tests__/permission-service-v3.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["consensusPath 통과","/etc/passwd 차단","external junction TOCTOU 검증","folder_missing throw"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: CliPermissionAdapter + CliSpawn + shell-env PATH 병합
tasks.description:
**Goal:** R1 adapter + spawn을 `src/main/providers/cli/`로 이식, macOS GUI PATH 상속 문제를 shell-env 패키지로 해결, `process.env ← shell-env ← rolestra overrides` 병합.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/main/providers/cli/{permission-adapter,cli-spawn,shell-env}.ts` + tests
- Modify: `package.json` (dep shell-env)

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/main/providers/cli/__tests__/`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/main/providers/cli/permission-adapter.ts","src/main/providers/cli/cli-spawn.ts","src/main/providers/cli/shell-env.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npx vitest run src/main/providers/cli/__tests__/","acceptanceCriteria":["3 CLI × 3 mode arg 일치","external+auto throw","env 병합 우선순위","non-darwin shell-env 생략"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: ProjectService + junction + meta.json
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 프로젝트 3종 생성 CRUD + folder + meta.json + junction/symlink + `kind=external, mode=auto` 거부 + folder_missing 감지.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/main/projects/{project-service,project-repository,project-meta,junction}.ts` + tests

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/main/projects/__tests__/`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/main/projects/project-service.ts","src/main/projects/project-repository.ts","src/main/projects/project-meta.ts","src/main/projects/junction.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npx vitest run src/main/projects/__tests__/","acceptanceCriteria":["3종 생성 DB+FS 동시","external+auto throw","슬러그 중복 throw","folder_missing 자동 감지"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: MemberProfileService + 출근 상태 머신 + PersonaBuilder
tasks.description:
**Goal:** MemberProfile CRUD + 4종 workStatus 머신(runtime warmup + status_override 병합) + 구조화 필드 기반 PersonaBuilder + 기본 아바타 8종 상수.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/main/members/{member-profile-service,member-profile-repository,persona-builder}.ts` + tests

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/main/members/__tests__/`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/main/members/member-profile-service.ts","src/main/members/persona-builder.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npx vitest run src/main/members/__tests__/","acceptanceCriteria":["setStatus offline-manual 지속","reconnect warmup 실패→offline-connection","PersonaBuilder 포맷 일치","아바타 8종"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: ChannelService + 시스템 채널 자동 생성
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Channel CRUD + 프로젝트 생성 시 `#일반/#승인-대기/#회의록` 자동 생성 + DM 중복 에러 + 시스템 채널 삭제/rename 금지.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/main/channels/{channel-service,channel-repository}.ts` + test
- Modify: `src/main/projects/project-service.ts` (ChannelService 주입)

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/main/channels/__tests__/channel-service.test.ts`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/main/channels/channel-service.ts","src/main/channels/channel-repository.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npx vitest run src/main/channels/__tests__/channel-service.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["3 system 채널 자동","시스템 삭제 throw","DM partial unique","project_members 복합 FK"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: MessageService + FTS5 검색
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 메시지 append + 채널별 역순 list + FTS bm25 검색(프로젝트/채널 scope) + author literal 검증 + 서비스 내부 message 이벤트 emit.

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/main/channels/__tests__/message-service.test.ts`


tasks.subject: Task 12: MeetingService + SsmContext v3 확장
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Meeting CRUD + active unique 보장 + SsmContext에 6개 v3 필드 추가(projectId/channelId/meetingId/projectPath/permissionMode/autonomyMode) + 모든 기존 ctx 호출부 수정.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/main/meetings/{meeting-service,meeting-repository}.ts` + test
- Modify: `src/main/engine/` SsmContext 정의 파일

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/main/meetings/__tests__/` && `npx tsc --noEmit`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/main/meetings/meeting-service.ts","src/main/meetings/meeting-repository.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npx vitest run src/main/meetings/__tests__/","acceptanceCriteria":["채널당 1 active unique","updateState snapshot 반영","SsmContext 6 필드 필수"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 13: ApprovalService (5종 kind)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 5종 approval kind 생성·결정·조회. hard DELETE 없음, supersede/expire로 종료. conditional은 status=approved + comment 저장 + event에 decision 함께.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/main/approvals/{approval-service,approval-repository}.ts` + test

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/main/approvals/__tests__/`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/main/approvals/approval-service.ts","src/main/approvals/approval-repository.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npx vitest run src/main/approvals/__tests__/","acceptanceCriteria":["create pending","decide approve/reject/conditional","재결정 throw","supersede/expire 보존"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 14: ConsensusFolderService (atomic rename + advisory lock)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `<ArenaRoot>/consensus/` atomic rename + mkdir-based advisory lock + 10s timeout + stale lock 자동 제거(pid 사라짐 또는 30s 초과).

**Files:**
- Create: `src/main/consensus/consensus-folder-service.ts` + test

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/main/consensus/__tests__/`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/main/consensus/consensus-folder-service.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npx vitest run src/main/consensus/__tests__/","acceptanceCriteria":["tmp+rename atomic","동시 2 writer 직렬화","stale lock 자동 제거","10s timeout throw"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 15: QueueService + CircuitBreaker (4종 상한)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** queue CRUD + orderIndex 1000 간격 + claimNext 트랜잭션 + recoverInProgress + CircuitBreaker 4종(파일 변경 20/CLI 30분/큐 연속 5/같은 에러 3회) + breaker fire 이벤트.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/main/queue/{queue-service,queue-repository,circuit-breaker}.ts` + tests

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/main/queue/__tests__/`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/main/queue/queue-service.ts","src/main/queue/queue-repository.ts","src/main/queue/circuit-breaker.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npx vitest run src/main/queue/__tests__/","acceptanceCriteria":["orderIndex 1000 간격","claimNext atomic","recoverInProgress 복원","breaker 4종 fire"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 16: NotificationService (Electron Notification + DB 로그)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** OS 알림 + 포커스 체크 + prefs per kind + DB 로그 + 클릭 라우팅 + NotifierAdapter 분리(Electron/Mock).

**Files:**

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/main/notifications/__tests__/`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/main/notifications/notification-service.ts","src/main/notifications/notification-repository.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npx vitest run src/main/notifications/__tests__/","acceptanceCriteria":["focus=true skip","enabled=false skip","click→event","test force 발송"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 17: IPC 타입·스키마 확장 (IpcChannelMap + zod + stream events)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** spec §6 9개 도메인 40+ 채널을 IpcChannelMap에 추가 + 각 채널 zod 스키마 + stream 이벤트 8종 discriminated union. 기존 v2 채널은 유지.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/shared/ipc-types.ts`, `src/shared/ipc-schemas.ts`
- Create: `src/shared/stream-events.ts`, `src/shared/__tests__/ipc-schemas-v3.test.ts`

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/shared/__tests__/ipc-schemas-v3.test.ts && npx tsc --noEmit`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/shared/ipc-types.ts","src/shared/ipc-schemas.ts","src/shared/stream-events.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npx vitest run src/shared/__tests__/ipc-schemas-v3.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["40+ 채널 추가","project external+auto refine","stream 이벤트 discriminated union","v2 채널 유지"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 18: IPC 핸들러 9종 + router 등록
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 9개 도메인 핸들러를 서비스와 연결하고 router에 register + 개발 모드 zod 검증 + 프로덕션 stream drop+5회 차단.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/main/ipc/handlers/{arena-root,project,channel,message,meeting,member,approval,notification,queue}-handler.ts`
- Modify: `src/main/ipc/router.ts`
- Create: `handlers-v3.test.ts`

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/main/ipc/__tests__/handlers-v3.test.ts`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/main/ipc/handlers/arena-root-handler.ts","src/main/ipc/handlers/project-handler.ts","src/main/ipc/handlers/channel-handler.ts","src/main/ipc/handlers/message-handler.ts","src/main/ipc/handlers/meeting-handler.ts","src/main/ipc/handlers/member-handler.ts","src/main/ipc/handlers/approval-handler.ts","src/main/ipc/handlers/notification-handler.ts","src/main/ipc/handlers/queue-handler.ts","src/main/ipc/router.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npx vitest run src/main/ipc/__tests__/handlers-v3.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["9 도메인 handler register","zod 검증 실패 IpcError","서비스 호출 round-trip"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 19: Stream Bridge (stream:* 이벤트 중앙화)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 각 서비스 EventEmitter를 StreamBridge로 funnel + 프로덕션 shape validation + 5회 실패시 30s 차단 + onOutbound→webContents.send 훅.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/main/streams/stream-bridge.ts` + test
- Modify: `src/main/index.ts` (bridge 연결)

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/main/streams/__tests__/`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/main/streams/stream-bridge.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npx vitest run src/main/streams/__tests__/","acceptanceCriteria":["message→stream:channel-message","invalid 5회 30s 차단","onOutbound 다중 리스너"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 20: SSM v3 side-effects + circuit breaker 런타임
tasks.description:
**Goal:** SSM 이벤트 4종(onMessage/onStateChange/onPermissionAction/onFinal)을 서비스에 연결 + breaker.on('fired') → autonomyMode='manual' + approval + notification.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/main/engine/v3-side-effects.ts` + test
- Modify: `src/main/engine/` ssm 관련 파일(ctx/호출부)

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/main/engine/__tests__/`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/main/engine/v3-side-effects.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npx vitest run src/main/engine/__tests__/","acceptanceCriteria":["message 저장+emit","#회의록 자동 포스트","breaker→manual+approval+알림","기존 SSM 테스트 여전히 PASS"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 21: v2 Renderer 호환 배너 + R2 통합 smoke
tasks.description:
**Goal:** v2 Renderer는 배너만 추가하고 그대로 유지 + router에 legacy 채널 warn + Vitest 기반 통합 smoke 1개(마이그레이션→서비스→bridge 전 흐름).

**Files:**
- Modify: renderer 최상단 배너
- Modify: `src/main/ipc/router.ts` legacy warn
- Create: `src/main/__tests__/r2-integration-smoke.test.ts`

**Verify:** `npx vitest run && npx tsc --noEmit`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/main/__tests__/r2-integration-smoke.test.ts","src/main/ipc/router.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npx vitest run","acceptanceCriteria":["11 마이그레이션 통과","시스템 채널 3개 자동","external+auto 거부 smoke","legacy 채널 warn 로그","전체 vitest PASS"]}
```
